    '  symbol: string;\n' +
    '  previousClose: number;\n' +

    '}\n' +
    '\n' +
    'export interface QuoteSummary {\n' +
    '  symbol: string;\n' +
    '  change: number;\n' +
    '  changePct: number;\n' +
    "  direction: 'up' | 'down' | 'flat';\n" +
    '}\n' +
    '\n' +
    'export function summarizeQuote(quote: Quote): QuoteSummary {\n' +
    '  const change = quote.currentPrice - quote.previousClose;\n' +
    '  const changePct = (change / quote.previousClose) * 100;\n' +
    '\n' +
    '  if (change > 0) {\n' +
    "    return { symbol: quote.symbol, change, changePct, direction: 'up' };\n" +
    '  } else if (change < 0) {\n' +
    "    return { symbol: quote.symbol, change, changePct, direction: 'down' };\n" +
    '  } else {\n' +
    "    return { symbol: quote.symbol, change, changePct, direction: 'flat' };\n" +
    '  }\n' +
    '}\n',
